What is this finish?
Use for one specific item when the image supports the explanation, but the slide is mostly teaching.
Item photo
  • Best use caseWhere this product, material, or style makes the most sense.
  • Why OPC would suggest itThe practical reason: durability, maintenance, budget, resale, or look.
  • Where it can failMoisture, heat, poor install prep, wrong substrate, or bad layout.
  • What to compareCost, lead time, warranty, maintenance, color, texture, and install complexity.
